project_title: Maya Chen, a female detective, chases a suspect through a ne
logline: A relentless detective, Maya Chen, pursues a slippery suspect through the underbelly of Neo-Kyoto, uncovering a conspiracy that reaches the city's highest echelons.
world_setting: Neo-Kyoto, 2077. A sprawling metropolis built on ancient foundations, now a fusion of cutting-edge technology and traditional Japanese aesthetics. Towering skyscrapers draped in holographic advertisements loom over narrow, lantern-lit alleyways. Cybernetics are commonplace, blurring the line between human and machine. The atmosphere is perpetually damp and hazy, with a palpable sense of social stratification and simmering unrest. Rain is frequent, reflecting the neon lights and casting long shadows. Crime is rampant, particularly in the lower districts controlled by Yakuza syndicates.
character_anchor: Maya Chen, East Asian female, short black bob haircut, sharp jawline, dark green trench coat, red scarf, silver ring on left hand

story_entities.name: Maya Chen
story_entities.description: East Asian, sharp jawline, high cheekbones, intense gaze, subtle cybernetic eye enhancement barely visible.. Age: 32, Body: Athletic, lean build.. Hair: Short, black bob haircut, perfectly symmetrical and just above shoulder length.. Outfit: Dark green trench coat (waterproofed tech fabric), red silk scarf tied loosely around neck, dark grey tactical pants, black leather boots, silver ring on left ring finger (dragon design).. Props: Glock 19 (concealed), holographic ID badge, encrypted comms device..

story_arc.opening: Maya Chen spots Kaito, a known data thief, attempting to fence stolen corporate secrets. She initiates pursuit as he ducks into the crowded market, weaving through the throng.
story_arc.development: Kaito sprints up the stairwell, Maya close behind. He throws obstacles in her path – crates, debris – slowing her down but not stopping her. | Kaito reaches the rooftop and attempts to escape across it. Maya corners him. A brief, tense standoff ensues. | Kaito reveals he's being paid by Ryuichi Sato, a powerful Yakuza boss, to deliver the data. He threatens to jump if Maya gets any closer.
story_arc.climax: Maya and Kaito fight inside the train. The fight is brutal and claustrophobic.
story_arc.resolution: Maya decides to use the data to expose Sato, knowing it will put her family at risk. The scene ends with Maya stepping back into the night, her face a mask of determination.
